text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Today we're testing the results of our ongoing
experiments!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're prepared, aren't you? I'm going to need
you to record everything!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's what I like to hear! I'm pretty excited as
well!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what type of results will be produced
from all the work we've done.
